_meta.description: Cu2O / Cs2SnI6 / SnO2 - lead-free tin halide
_meta.reference: Chabri et al., J. Electron. Mater. 52, 2722 (2023)
_meta.notes: Lead-free chalcogenide. Known hard case: asymmetric mobility (mu_n=53, mu_p=0.03 cm^2/Vs) produces sharp J-V knee near V_oc that 1D solvers can under-resolve.
